name: Gravity's Apple
short_description: An action adventure game in which you guide a rolling apple. As you roll through various stages accompanied by soothing music, your goal is to reach the top of Newton's head.
detailed_description:
Deliver the apple to Newton's head

An action adventure game where you guide a rolling apple.

Roll through various stages with soothing music, aiming for the top of Newton's head.

[Game Objective]

The objective is to prove the law of gravity by controlling the apple and using movement, jumping, and braking to aim for the top of Newton's head. However, the apple is fragile, so its durability decreases every time it falls. When it runs out of durability, the game is over.

[Game Features]

Beautiful Stages: Enjoy a pleasant adventure in stages with a fantastical and elegant worldview.

Hidden Items: Attractive golden apples have been placed. When you collect golden apples...

[Play Time]

120 to 240 minutes

[About Video Streaming]

Video streaming of this game is welcome! If you stream, we would appreciate it if you could include the store URL.

[Options]

You can set graphic settings, mouse sensitivity, language, and other settings from the options.

・Language

・Texture quality

・Anti-aliasing

・Frame rate

・Various sound volumes

・Mouse sensitivity
